2026-06-23PMOCanada Revenue Agency ActAppointment of the Commissioner of RevenueAppointment of Heather Evans of Toronto, Ontario, to be Commissioner of Revenue, to hold office during pleasure for a term of five years, effective July 13, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of the Commissioner of Revenue
precis: Appointment of Heather Evans of Toronto, Ontario, to be Commissioner of Revenue, to hold office during pleasure for a term of five years, effective July 13, 2026.
